title: tephroseris subdentata
intro: Tephroseris subdentata, also known as the alpine moss, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Tephroseris subdentata include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Tephroseris subdentata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
